elements.original_description: A child sitting on a chair, looking curious with wide eyes, surrounded by a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a child sitting on a chair, looking curious with wide eyes, surrounded by a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. The mood is innocent and receptive, as if observing quietly. Pure white background, sharp lines, simple shapes.

elements.original_description: A group of adults standing in a room, one holding a stack of papers with a worried expression, while a child observes from the side.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a group of adults standing in a room, one holding a stack of papers with a worried expression, while a child observes from the side. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. The scene conveys tension and observation. Pure white background, simple geometric figures, clear emotional expressions.
